## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass: `python -m pytest tests -q`
- [ ] Lab smoke passes: `smoke_pack` returns `passed`
- [ ] No new dependencies added (unless explicitly approved)
- [ ] No external API calls introduced
- [ ] Documentation updated if public API changed
- [ ] Related issue linked (if applicable)

## For Non-Code Changes

- [ ] Documentation-only: no test changes needed
- [ ] Example-only: verified runnable
